points: Gained hands-on experience in software development, contributing to the development of cutting-edge technologies.
Wrote, tested, and debugged code to meet project requirements while collaborating with senior developers to design and implement software solutions.
Participated in the design and architecture of software applications, applying design patterns and best practices.
Assisted in writing unit tests, performing code reviews, and collaborating with QA teams to ensure software quality.
Documented code and technical details for future reference and maintenance.
Actively engaged in skill development, learning about new Python technologies, tools, and methodologies.
Utilized version control systems like Git for collaborative development and efficient code management.
Completed a 2-month self-paced internship focused on building real-world applications using modern web technologies.
Task 1 (Personal Portfolio Website): Developed a fully responsive portfolio using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js with contact form email integration and SEO optimization.
Task 2 (Weather Dashboard App): Built a weather app using React.js and Node.js to fetch real-time data from OpenWeather API and save favorite cities.
Task 3 (Website Rebranding Using AI): Reimagined UI/UX of a famous brand using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Firebase with CMS support.
Conducted data visualization analytics to identify top retail markets and product category growth.
Designed interactive analytics dashboards using data modeling and dashboard configurations.
Identified sales trends and inventory bottlenecks, presenting insights for data-driven decisions.
Drafted visual charts representing business performance and customer segments.
Learned about Assistant technologies and services.
Worked as the Mobile Application Administrator for administrative controls.
Worked for social causes and contributed to charitable trusts.
